title: Sam See Sam See It Sam Say It Sam Sorted Wip
description: Award nominated Sam See has a brand new hour of stand-up comedy! This show promises to be rib-tickling, side-splitting, and [INSERT THIRD THING BEFORE PRINT]! Whether you want gay jokes, Asian jokes, immigrant jokes, or whichever minority group you support, he’s probably one of them! He’s totally written this copy, not his agent, who definitely hasn't banned him from doing what he loves: slideshow comedy, educational humour, and heartfelt messages. NOPE! None of THAT will happen, that’s not what famous comedians do! Join Sam as he tries to tick the boxes, be a 'successful comedian', and understand what it means to be yourself in this modern world.
